name: westmarch-generic
description: Configurable westmarch-style Avrae workshop — server setup via svars and config gvars

scripts.generate-env: npm run generate-env:dev && npm run generate-env:prod
scripts.avrae:test-utils: npm run avrae:test-utils:config && npm run avrae:test-utils:catalogues && npm run avrae:test-utils:gameplay && npm run avrae:test-utils:systems
scripts.avrae:test-utils:config: avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/auth --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/config --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/display --log-level INFO
scripts.avrae:test-utils:catalogues: avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/catalogues --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/content --log-level INFO
scripts.avrae:test-utils:gameplay: avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/encounters --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/exploration --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/world --log-level INFO
scripts.avrae:test-utils:systems: avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/core --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/crafting --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/economy --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/misc --log-level INFO && avrae-ls --run-tests src/gvars/utils/pc --log-level INFO
